title: Backend TypeScript compilation errors preventing Docker build
description: The backend Docker build failed with 20+ TypeScript compilation errors across multiple service files, preventing the Express server from being built.

errors.error: TS2353: 'cron' does not exist in type 'RepeatOptions'
errors.cause: BullMQ v4+ renamed the 'cron' property to 'pattern' in RepeatOptions.
errors.fix: Changed 'cron' to 'pattern' in both RepeatOptions objects.

errors: TS7016: Could not find a declaration file for module 'opossum'
TS7006: Parameter 'result' implicitly has an 'any' type
errors.cause: The 'opossum' circuit breaker library does not ship TypeScript declarations, and strict mode requires explicit types.
errors.fix: Added @ts-ignore for the import and explicit 'any' type annotation on the 'result' parameter.

errors.error: TS2322: Type 'Promise<unknown>' is not assignable to type 'Promise<RedisReply>'
errors.cause: The sendCommand function's return type didn't match the expected SendCommandFn signature from the rate-limit library.
errors.fix: Cast the sendCommand function with 'as any' to satisfy the type constraint.

errors.error: TS2322: Type 'null' is not assignable to type 'string | undefined'
errors.cause: Used null where the Prisma schema expected string | undefined.

errors.error: TS2339: Property 'where' does not exist on type (Prisma query args)
errors.cause: Prisma 5.x query arg types are optional (T | undefined), so accessing .where on them fails type-checking when cast via Parameters<typeof prisma.X.Y>[0]['where'].
errors.fix: Replaced the complex type casts with simple 'as any' casts for the where clauses.

errors: TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'FulfillmentStatus'
errors.cause: writeAuditEntry() was called with a single object argument instead of positional args (actorId, action, entityType, entityId, detail). Additionally, a plain string was passed where the Prisma FulfillmentStatus enum was expected.
errors.fix: Converted writeAuditEntry calls to use positional arguments. Added FulfillmentStatus import and cast 'status as FulfillmentStatus' for the Prisma update.

rootCause: Multiple type incompatibilities accumulated from library version mismatches (BullMQ v4, Prisma 5, opossum without types) and incorrect function call signatures in service layer code.
impact: Backend Docker image could not be built, blocking all services from starting.
